response.justification: The candidate lacks substantial C++ experience and industrial automation domain knowledge, which are core to the role; their career is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web and GIS contexts, with only a brief, outdated C++ stint at National Instruments over 9 years ago, and no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols required for the position.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and technical education
Proven ability to deliver complex systems in distributed environments
concerns: Minimal recent C++ or STL experience; primary language is TypeScript/Node.js
No demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or OT protocols
Lacks documented experience with message brokers, multi-threaded C++ systems, or cloud-native industrial platforms
